risk_if_not_implemented: Without AI TEVV Third-Party Risk Management, security risks may go unmanaged, resulting in uncontrolled exposures and misaligned security investments.

compensating_control_1.name: Security, Compliance & Resilience Assessments
compensating_control_1.description: Mechanisms exist to regularly review processes and documented procedures to ensure conformity with the organization's security, compliance and/or resilience policies, standards and other applicable requirements.
compensating_control_1.justification: Security, Compliance & Resilience Assessments (CPL-03) provides periodic assessment and assurance that compensates for the absence of AI TEVV Third-Party Risk Management (AAT-10.19) by providing structured evaluation of the environment to surface gaps and verify residual control effectiveness. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.

compensating_control_2.name: Secure Software Development Practices (SSDP)
compensating_control_2.description: Mechanisms exist to develop applications based on Secure Software Development Practices (SSDP).
compensating_control_2.justification: Secure Software Development Practices (SSDP) (TDA-06) provides overlapping security capability that compensates for the absence of AI TEVV Third-Party Risk Management (AAT-10.19) by addressing related risk objectives through an alternative control mechanism aligned with Process applicability. Given the process-oriented nature of this control, this compensating control targets the same underlying risk objective through an alternative approach, helping to maintain an acceptable level of residual risk until the primary control can be implemented.
